title: Indian-Style Pancetta Curry
description: A fusion of Indian and Italian flavors, this curry dish is a unique twist on traditional pancetta recipes. Serve over basmati rice or with naan bread.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the pancetta and cook until crispy, then remove from the pan.
Add the onion, garlic, and ginger to the pan and cook until softened.
Add the curry paste and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the coconut milk and bring to a simmer.
Stir in the marinated Indian yogurt and cook until heated through.
Return the pancetta to the pan and season with salt to taste.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve over basmati rice or with naan bread.
